title: Gant Chart created from file
excerpt: I am trying to create a Gant chart using an excel file containing a table.  based on my research, it doesn’t seem to be possible to upload a file for Gant chart creation. Is that assumption correct?  Its too much data to…

posts.author: AirportGuy45 (Chris Coats)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create a Gant chart using an excel file containing a table. based on my research, it doesn’t seem to be possible to upload a file for Gant chart creation. Is that assumption correct? Its too much data to manually enter each for the chart. If it is in fact not possible, is this something that could be added in the future?
